LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS BARRED BECAUSE HE FAILED TO FILE SUIT WITHIN 6 MONTHS OF REJECTION OF HIS GOVERNMENT CLAIM. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.6. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Harry Norman, appearing, Plaintiff in Pro Per, and opposing party; Meghan K. Higgins, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3896, representing Defendant, CCSF, and moving party. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS BARRED BECAUSE HE FAILED TO FILE SUIT WITHIN 6 MONTHS OF REJECTION OF HIS GOVERNMENT CLAIM. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.6. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
